name: comp_injective
code:
import Mathlib

theorem comp_injective {α β γ : Type*} (f : β → γ) (g : α → β)
    (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
    Function.Injective (f ∘ g) :=
  by
  exact Function.Injective.comp hf hg

name: nat_strong_induction
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_strong_induction (P : ℕ → Prop) (h0 : P 0) (h1 : ∀ n, (∀ m < n, P m) → P n) : ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | ind n ih => exact h1 n ih

name: card_image_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_image_le (s : Finset ℕ) (f : ℕ → ℕ) : (s.image f).card ≤ s.card := by
  apply Finset.card_image_le

name: nat_strong_induction
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_strong_induction (P : ℕ → Prop) (h0 : P 0) (h1 : ∀ n, (∀ m < n, P m) → P n) : ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | ind n ih => exact h1 n ih

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (A B : List α) : (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: finset_union_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm (A B : Finset ℕ) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  exact Finset.union_comm A B

name: even_or_odd
code:
import Mathlib

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n := by
  exact Nat.even_or_odd n

name: empty_subset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem empty_subset (α : Type u) (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s := 
  Set.empty_subset s

name: double_complement
code:
import Mathlib

theorem double_complement (α : Type u) (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: pow_two_ge_one
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_two_ge_one (n : ℕ) : 2^n ≥ 1 := by
  apply Nat.one_le_pow
  exact Nat.zero_lt_two

name: nat_strong_induction
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_strong_induction (P : ℕ → Prop) (h0 : P 0) (h1 : ∀ n, (∀ m < n, P m) → P n) :
    ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | ind n ih => exact h1 n ih

name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  exact Nat.add_comm a b

name: even_or_odd
code:
import Mathlib

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n := by
  exact Nat.even_or_odd n

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone (a b : ℕ) (h : a ≤ b) : 2^a ≤ 2^b := by
  apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by decide)
  exact h

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets (A B C : Set α) (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C := by
  exact Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by
  cases b <;> rfl

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 0 < 2^n := by
  exact Nat.two_pow_pos n

name: de_morgan_not_and
code:
import Mathlib

theorem de_morgan_not_and (P Q : Prop) : ¬(P ∧ Q) ↔ (¬P ∨ ¬Q) :=
  not_and_or

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem mono_comp_strict {α β γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ]
  {g : β → γ} {f : α → β} (hg : StrictMono g) (hf : StrictMono f) :
  StrictMono (g ∘ f) := 
by
  apply StrictMono.comp hg hf
  done

name: surjective_card_ge
code:
import Mathlib

theorem surjective_card_ge (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Surjective f) :
    n ≥ m := by
  have h1 : Fintype.card (Fin n) ≥ Fintype.card (Fin m) :=
    Fintype.card_le_of_surjective f hf
  simp only [Fintype.card_fin] at h1
  exact h1

  exact Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: card_image_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_image_le [DecidableEq β] (s : Finset α) (f : α → β) : (s.image f).card ≤ s.card :=
  Finset.card_image_le
